falsification_conditions.condition: The price closes above the 200-day moving average by 5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A strong bullish breakout would contradict the HOLD signal and invalidate the pattern's bearish implications

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score increases to 60 or higher within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant rise in blowoff pressure would indicate a market phase shift incompatible with the current HOLD verdict

falsification_conditions.condition: Trading volume exceeds 150% of the 30-day average on three consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained extreme volume would indicate a market dynamic shift that directly contradicts the pattern's expected behavior

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
